creator: girgen@partitur.se
text:
Crimson has been updated to 1.1.3
This superceeds PR ports/30996

The jaxp.jar file is removed and content incorporated into
crimson.jar, added a note about this in pkg_message.

Also, there are no uncertainties about the license, it is apache
license. Removed that clause.

Now obeys http://www.freebsd.org/java/docs/howtoports.html
and puts docs into $PREFIX/share/doc/java/crimson

Fix: Apply this patch (and close PR 30996).
